title: CAM acts on Lighthouse Learning - Early Learning Village partnership
description: Lighthouse Learning Private Limited has entered into a strategic partnership with the Gurugram-based Early Learning Village.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas represented Lighthouse Learning on this partnership.The transaction team was led by Vivek Kathpalia (Partner) and Aarushi Jain (Partner, Head - Media, Education & Gaming), with the assistance from Sanya Singh (Senior Associate) and Maya Venkiteswaran (Associate).Abe Abraham (Partner), with the assistance from Akshat Sahajpal (Principal Associat
